_publications._publicationTitle: The Combination of HSP90 Inhibitors and Selumetinib Reinforces the Inhibitory Effects on Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: To evaluate the drug combination potential between HSP90i and selumetinib, we use the IDAcombo R package to calculate the IDAcombo Score, which predicts the combination benefit based on the individual effects of the two drugs
details: Successfully calculated IDAcombo scores to predict combination benefit between HSP90i and selumetinib based on individual drug effects
